description: Carry bias filter test on 6J strategies using 60-day return as proxy
proxy: 60-day rolling return of 6J price. Negative = USD carry favorable (short 6J). Positive = yen strengthening (long 6J).
conclusion: Carry filter improves both PF and Sharpe on both strategies. Removes low-quality trades fighting macro carry direction. Does not need external rate data.
implementation_note: Consider as controller-level filter for 6J strategies. Do not implement as standalone strategy.
